query:
-- Get the step-level JSON from the last completed run
SELECT id, status, apolloCreditsUsed, 
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[10]') as step11,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[11]') as step12_gapfill,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[12]') as step13_backfill,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[13]') as step14_manual
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE status = 'completed'
ORDER BY startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

SELECT id, status, apolloCreditsUsed, 
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[10]') as step11,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[11]') as step12_gapfill,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[12]') as step13_backfill,
       JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[13]') as step14_manual
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE status = 'completed'
ORDER BY startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
